overall.description: A maritime ship simulator game showing first-person view from the vessel's bridge during nighttime navigation. The scene features operational navigation displays including GPS, radar, and depth sounder, with the ship moving through coastal waters illuminated by periodic lightning flashes.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge with electronic command displays

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the ocean and ship bow through the bridge windows

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring GPS and radar displays while navigating through coastal waters at night

entered.detail: left monitor showing nautical chart with vessel position and coastal geography
center circular radar screen with rotating sweep showing surrounding terrain and contacts
right monitor showing depth sounder profile and water column information
forward deck of the vessel with metal railings and anchor equipment visible through the window
metal safety railings along the bow deck perimeter
red port-side navigation light glowing on the starboard horizon
dark water with visible wake patterns from the vessel's movement
distant landmass visible on the horizon with faint lights

segments.scene_description: View from inside a ship's bridge showing the bow moving through dark coastal waters at night. Three navigation displays show GPS, radar, and depth information. A red navigation light is visible on the starboard side with distant coastline on the horizon. A lightning flash occurs at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge during storm conditions

events.description: second lightning flash brightly illuminates the surrounding ocean and vessel structure

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the storm while monitoring navigation instruments for coastal hazards

segments.scene_description: Continuing navigation through stormy night conditions with the ship's radar actively scanning. The coastal landmass remains visible on the starboard side, appearing closer as the vessel progresses. The bridge instruments remain illuminated while the exterior is periodically dark.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge in open ocean

agents.ego_description: navigating in open waters with no visible landmarks, relying solely on electronic navigation systems

segments.scene_description: The ship has moved into open waters with the coastline no longer visible on the horizon. Navigation continues through the dark ocean with only the vessel's instruments, bow lighting, and navigation lights visible against the night. The radar continues to sweep for contacts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as the vessel navigates from a stormy coastline into the isolation of the open ocean at night. It begins with the bow cutting through dark coastal waters, where illuminated GPS, radar, and depth displays contrast with a distant shoreline and a red starboard navigation light. As a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the storm, the camera continues forward, bringing the coastal landmass closer to the starboard side while the radar actively scans the surroundings. The scene then shifts as the vessel progresses further from the coast, causing the landmass to gradually vanish from the horizon. Finally, the view opens into the vast, dark expanse of the open sea, leaving only the glow of the bridge instruments and the ship's own navigation lights visible against the void.
